title: Simple PCR-SSP- rs6656401-In4 - CR1

steps: Add Ultrapure Water to the microtube of each mix. Ultrapure Water Contributed by users undetermined, for sample
Add Coral Buffer to each mix 1x Coral Buffer Qiagen undetermined, for sample

The amounts described in this protocol are for one sample. Multiply them for the number of samples to be investigated. Remember: Each sample shall be tested in two mix reactions 1 and 2 (2 tubes). Always make plus 10% mix. For this PCR we use 2 microtubes because are 2 mixes. Label properly the microtubes for the mixes, identifying them: mix 1 (with A allele of SNP of rs6656401) and mix 2 (with G allele SNP of rs6656401). Keep these microtubes in ice.
Add 0.2 mM dNTP dNTP MIX (mM) 0.2 Contributed by users undetermined, for sample

Add control primer (forward and reverse) - HGH: 0.08 µl for forward 0.08 µl for reverse 5’-3’ Sequence: HGH f TGCCTTCCCAACCATTCCCTTA HGH r CCACTCACGGATTTCTGTTGTGTTTC The size of the fragment is 431bp HGH (Control Primer) - Forward and Reverse Contributed by users undetermined, for sample/ 0.1 µM

Add the specific primers: MIX 1 - In4_rs6656401_A_f + in4_G_r MIX 2 - In4_rs6656401_G_f + in4_G_r 0.24µl to each primer (F and R) 5’-3’ Sequence - rs6656401 - primers forwards: CTCTGTCTCCATCTTCTC A CTCTGTCTCCATCTTCTC G 5’-3’ Sequence - intron 4 - primer reverse: CATAGTTGTAGTTGGGGATTG The size of the fragment is 257bp Specific Primers Forward and Reverse Contributed by users undetermined, for sample/ 0.3 µM
Add an aliquot of DNA sample to each tube Kepp the plate cold. DNA sample Contributed by users undetermined, for sample
Add the Taq DNA polymerase to the mix. Briefly vortex and centrifuge for some seconds. Taq DNA polymerase Invitrogen - Thermo Fisher undetermined, 0.04 Units/ul
Add an aliquot of the mix to each tube. Remember, each sample shall be tested in two mix reactions 1 and 2 (2 tubes). The final volume for each sample is 8 µl. undetermined, for sample
Close well the tubes and centrifuge for some seconds Put in the thermocycler

Use: Thermal cycling begins with 94°C for 5 min and 20 s; followed by 33 cycles, where each cycle began with 94 °C for 20 s and ended with 72 °C for 40 s. The annealing temperatures were 58°C for the initial 11 cycles, 55°C for the following 11 cycles and 52°C for the last 11 cycles.
creator: Gabriela GCK Canalli Kretzschmar
